description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Train service enhancement during Christmas  New Year
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 聖誕新年期間加強服務

2024-12-25T08:12:00.CONTENT_EN:
To make trips more convenient during the festive season, MTRCL has added extra train trips and adjusted service hours as follows:
New Year's Eve (31 December) ​
- All local lines and 7 Light Rail routes will operate overnight (except for Airport Express, Disneyland Resort Line and journeys to or from Lo Wu and Lok Ma Chau stations on the East Rail Line)
- Disneyland Resort Line service hours will be extended
- Service hours will be extended on 3 bus routes (506, K51 and K54)

There will be a total of 2,200 extra train trips between 20 December and 1 January. The Island Line and South Island Line will operate at an increased frequencyof approximately 3-4 minutes most of the time during the weekends and holidays. 

The Airport Express will provide addition early and late train trips as follows:
- 25 December and 1 January: the first train will depart from Hong Kong Station at 5:30am
- 29 December and 1 January: the last train will depart from AsiaWorld-Expo Station at 1:00am the next day

Please refer to MTRCL website for more information.
2024-12-25T08:12:00.CONTENT_CN:
為方便乘客外出歡度佳節，港鐵公司服務安排如下：
除夕夜（12月31日）​
- 本地鐵路綫及7條輕鐵路綫通宵行駛（不包括機場快綫、迪士尼綫及東鐵綫往返羅湖及落馬洲站）
- 迪士尼綫延長服務時間
- 3條巴士綫（506、K51及K54）延長服務時間

此外，12月20日至1月1日期間，部分本地鐵路綫於不同時段加密列車班次，總共增加2200班列車，其中港島綫及南港島綫於周末及假日大部份時間將加密至約3至4分鐘一班車。

而機場快綫會作出以下特別安排，方便出行旅客：
- 12月25日及1月1日：香港站頭班車提前於早上05:30開出
- 12月29日及1月1日：博覽館站尾班車延至翌日凌晨01:00開出

詳情請參閱港鐵網站。
